title: Q3 town hall on Friday
body: Join the company all-hands at 4:00 PM in the main hall or via the live stream. Bring your questions for the leadership Q&A session.

title: Updated leave policy
body: The annual carry-over cap has been raised to 10 days, effective this quarter. Please review the updated handbook for full details.

title: Office closed on July 15
body: The office will remain closed for the public holiday. Enjoy the long weekend and stay safe!

title: New hires joining the Platform team
body: Please welcome two new engineers joining Platform this week. Say hello on the team channel and help them settle in.
